CBP.name: Controlling Blood Pressure
CBP.description: Adults 18-85 with hypertension whose BP was adequately controlled (<140/90)

GSD.name: Glycemic Status Assessment (HbA1c)
GSD.description: Adults 18-75 with diabetes whose HbA1c was <9.0%

BCS.name: Breast Cancer Screening
BCS.description: Women 50-74 who had a mammogram within the measurement year or prior year

COL.name: Colorectal Cancer Screening
COL.description: Adults 45-75 with appropriate colorectal cancer screening

CCS.name: Cervical Cancer Screening
CCS.description: Women 21-64 with appropriate cervical cancer screening
CCS.target: Pap test (3yr) or HPV test (5yr) or co-testing (5yr)

OMW.name: Osteoporosis Management in Women Who Had a Fracture
OMW.description: Women 67-85 who had a fracture and received bone mineral density testing or osteoporosis medication

DSF.name: Depression Screening and Follow-Up
DSF.description: Patients 12+ screened for depression with a standardized tool and follow-up plan if positive
DSF.target: PHQ-2/PHQ-9 screening; follow-up plan if positive

CDC-HbA1c.name: Comprehensive Diabetes Care - HbA1c Testing
CDC-HbA1c.description: Adults 18-75 with diabetes who had HbA1c testing

CDC-Eye.name: Comprehensive Diabetes Care - Eye Exam
CDC-Eye.description: Adults 18-75 with diabetes who had a retinal eye exam

KED.name: Kidney Health Evaluation for Patients with Diabetes
KED.description: Adults 18-85 with diabetes who had kidney health evaluation (eGFR + UACR)
